---
title: "portfolio"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
    theme: cosmo
    css: styles.css
lang: en
project:
  type: website
  output-dir: docs
---

<!-- ============================================================
     HEADER SECTION
     - Social/nav links in the red banner
     - Brief intro paragraph
     ============================================================ -->

<p>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/rikimatsumoto/" target="_blank">LinkedIn |</a>
<a href="https://github.com/rikimatsumoto" target="_blank">GitHub |</a>
<a href="https://medium.com/@rikimatsumoto" target="_blank">Analytics blog (Medium) |</a>
<a href="https://urlto.me/2Qryr" target="_blank">Rotating fish</a>
</p>

## hello! im riki!

I have a Master's in analytics from Georgia Tech and am a former IMF research analyst. I've spent 5+ years as a full-stack research and data person across economics and international policy institutions. Currently, I lead an ML project that predicts farmers' adoption rates of agricultural training deployed for project teams.

I try to continuously upskill in ML/AI tooling. For a project, I used LangChain + ChromaDB to build an LLM-based app that assessed foreign investment suitability. Most recently, I wrote an [essay about how camera resolution and distance affect facial recognition accuracy](https://rikimatsumoto.github.io/essay/essay_2025-12-01.html). 

Outside my career, I work on my [art projects](https://rikimatsumoto.github.io/art/index_art.html), practice judo, volunteer in the DC Community Emergency Response Team (CERT), and am prepping for my amateur HAM radio technician license.

<!-- ============================================================
     PREVIEW GRID
     Each .preview-row is one section of the site.
     Each .preview-card is one recent item from that section.
     
     HOW TO UPDATE:
     1. Copy a .preview-row block
     2. Change the .preview-section label
     3. Update the card titles, descriptions, and href links
     ============================================================ -->

<div class="preview-grid">

<!-- ─── ROW: PROJECTS ─────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="preview-section-label">PROJECTS</div>

<div class="preview-row">
  <a href="01_projects.html#zetetic-llm-powered-investment-app" class="preview-card">
    <span class="card-category">ML / AI</span>
    <span class="card-title">Zetetic-LLM Powered Investment App</span>
    <span class="card-desc">Web-app that converts investment ideas/theses into executable strategies using multiple AI models.</span>
  </a>

  <a href="01_projects.html#discounted-cash-flow-dcf-analysis-tool" class="preview-card">
    <span class="card-category">FINANCE</span>
    <span class="card-title">Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) Analysis Tool</span>
    <span class="card-desc">Web-app automating Monte Carlo DCF analysis for publicly traded companies via Yahoo Finance.</span>
  </a>
</div>

<!-- ─── ROW: ESSAYS ───────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="preview-section-label">ESSAYS</div>

<div class="preview-row">
  <a href="essay/essay_2025-12-01.html" class="preview-card">
    <span class="card-category">COMPUTER VISION</span>
    <span class="card-title">Camera Resolution and Distance in Facial Recognition Accuracy</span>
    <span class="card-desc">How pixel density and subject distance affect the reliability of facial recognition systems.</span>
  </a>

  <a href="#" class="preview-card">
    <span class="card-category"></span>
    <span class="card-title"></span>
    <span class="card-desc"></span>
  </a>
</div>

<!-- ─── ROW: POLICY WORK ── -->
<div class="preview-section-label">POLICY TOOLS</div>

<div class="preview-row">
  <a href="01_projects.html#us-federal-expenditure-tracker-brookings" class="preview-card">
    <span class="card-category">BROOKINGS</span>
    <span class="card-title">U.S. Federal Expenditure Tracker</span>
    <span class="card-desc">Interactive tracker of federal spending patterns and trends.</span>
  </a>

  <a href="https://www.imf.org/en/publications/tnm/issues/2022/10/03/imf-engagement-on-social-safety-net-issues-in-surveillance-and-program-work-524087" class="preview-card">
    <span class="card-category">IMF</span>
    <span class="card-title">IMF Engagement on Social Safety Nets</span>
    <span class="card-desc">A Technical Guidance Note on IMF Engagement on Social Safety Net Issues in Surveillance and Program Work</span>
  </a>
</div>

<!-- ─── ROW: ART ──────────────────────────────────────── -->
<div class="preview-section-label">ART</div>

<div class="preview-row">
  <a href="art.html#lapiscine_lamp" class="preview-card">
    <span class="card-category">LATEST</span>
    <span class="card-title">DIY "La Piscine" lamp</span>
    <span class="card-desc">Fixed an estate sale lamp with custom lamp fixture and bulb.</span>
  </a>

  <a href="art.html#frog_jacket" class="preview-card">
    <span class="card-category">TEXTILE</span>
    <span class="card-title">"Frog" Button Jacket</span>
    <span class="card-desc">Customizing an embroidered jacket with 1960's Chinese rayon frog closures.</span>
  </a>
</div>

</div>

---

#### what I'm thinking about right now:

<blockquote class="bluesky-embed" data-bluesky-uri="at://did:plc:c2pjvazhh5txx57qt6jluvb2/app.bsky.feed.post/3ly47s3k3uc2g" data-bluesky-cid="bafyreiagxf6oc2bffysjcxlscfq7yantkzigeekmj4uaunlbpxgij5jslq" data-bluesky-embed-color-mode="system"><p lang="en">Point metrics don’t tell you whether the model outputs align with the observed data distribution.

I.e., if the model has a good (low) RMSE but predicts a noticeably different distribution, it might be overfitting the center and neglecting the tails. Distributional metrics help identify this.<br><br><a href="https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:c2pjvazhh5txx57qt6jluvb2/post/3ly47s3k3uc2g?ref_src=embed">[image or embed]</a></p>&mdash; riki (<a href="https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:c2pjvazhh5txx57qt6jluvb2?ref_src=embed">@rikimatsumoto.bsky.social</a>) <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/did:plc:c2pjvazhh5txx57qt6jluvb2/post/3ly47s3k3uc2g?ref_src=embed">September 5, 2025 at 1:47 PM</a></blockquote><script async src="https://embed.bsky.app/static/embed.js" charset="utf-8"></script>


<!-- ============================================================
     END OF INDEX PAGE
     ============================================================ -->
